violations.description: Water Supply. — --Water source or system was not of sufficient capacity to meet the demands of the food establishment. -No running water available at time of inspection.
General employee cleanliness. — --Food employee did not wash hands as necessary. -Employee on staff was unable to wash hands due to no water supply at time of inspection.

Thawing potentially hazardous food. — --Potentially hazardous food was not thawed in an approved manner. -Container of rice was sitting out to thaw (per owner). Was at 68F. Need to thaw under refrigeration, cold running water or as part of cooking process.

Cooling of potentially hazardous food. — --Owner stated that pots of hot food were set out until cool enough to put in residential style fridge. Hot foods need to be cooled from 140Fto 70F in 2 hrs. or less. Then from 70F to 41F or below in additional 4 hrs. or less. Owner was unsure of cool down requirements.

Sanitizing solution testing devices. — --Test strip or kit that accurately measures the sanitizing concentration was not provided. -Test strips for bleach/chlorine were not available at time of inspection.

Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was not provided in sufficient number and/or not accessible to allow convenient use by employees. -Handwash sink was blocked by screen door. Coffee pot used for temporary handwash was empty.
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
Available, adequate capacity, able to maintain proper temperature (4 pts deducted)
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Hot holding and cold holding temperatures maintained, unwrapped food not reserved (5 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Available, adequate capacity, able to maintain proper temperature (4 pts deducted)
